---
name: Benchmark / Results Sharing
about: Share profiling results from your hardware and workloads
title: "[RESULTS] "
labels: results
assignees: ''
---

## System

- Mac model:
- Chip (M1/M2/M3/etc):
- Unified memory size:

---

## Model Configuration

- Model:
- Quantization:
- Context size:
- llama.cpp version/commit:

---

## Workload Type

Examples:
- coding agent
- chat
- long-context summarization
- RAG
- reasoning

---

## MTP Settings Tested

List the tested draft-token configurations.

Example:
- disabled
- n_max=1
- n_max=2
- n_max=3

---

## Observations

What did you observe?

Examples:
- throughput uplift
- acceptance-rate changes
- memory pressure
- instability
- long-context degradation

---

## Charts / Outputs

Attach generated charts if possible.

---

## Parsed JSON / Logs (Optional)

Sanitized logs or parsed outputs are welcome if you are comfortable sharing them.
